reference: Dear patient, you seem to have hematoma formation on your forehead. If there is no vomiting and dizziness, an internal head injury is less likely, but a computerized tomography scan of the brain should be done to be sure. You should be observant for forty-eight hours after the injury. If nothing happens in forty-eight hours, you should not have a head injury. Apply ice packs on your forehead and take four hundred milligrams of ibuprofen twice a day for pain relief. Take chymoral forte twice a day for swelling.
text: Dear patient, you seem to have a camera formation on your forehead. If there is no vomiting and dizziness, an internal head injury is less likely. But a computerized tomography scan of the brain should be done to be sure. You should be observant for forty-eight hours after the injury. If nothing happens in forty-eight hours, you should not have a head injury. Apply ice pack on your forehead and take four hundred milligrams of ibuprofen twice a day for pain relief. Take Tymorel Forte twice a day for slowly.
